Why Carrot Oil

The shortcut to a deeper bronze

A glow-boosting oil that enhances your natural tan while it conditions your skin.

Glossy golden glow

Carrot oil deepens and enriches your natural tan for a rich, sun-drenched bronze.

Silky, non-sticky

A fine, dry-touch oil that absorbs to a high-shine finish, never greasy or tacky.

Nourishing as you tan

Conditioning oils keep skin soft, smooth and hydrated right through sun exposure.

Irresistible scents

Sugar Cloud, Vanilla Bomb and Sweet Apple, each made to smell exactly like summer.

The feel

A dry-touch oil that melts into a glow

Spray, smooth and go. Carrot Oil is a fine mist that sinks in fast for a glossy, golden finish, without the heavy, sticky residue of a traditional tanning oil.

  • Enriched with carrot oil to boost and deepen your tan.
  • Lightweight dry-oil mist that dries to a high-shine, non-greasy finish.
  • Loved by experienced tanners and sunbed users for an even, golden colour.
How to use

Glow in three steps

Simple to build into any tanning routine, indoors or out.

01

Apply generously

Smooth an even layer over all exposed skin before you tan, then work it in for a uniform glow.

02

Reapply for shine

Top up after swimming, sweating or towel-drying to keep that glossy, golden finish going.

03

Tan sensibly

Avoid intensive midday sun, 11am to 3pm, and never over-expose your skin while you build colour.

A note on sun protection

Carrot Oil is a tanning oil, not a sunscreen. SPF0 offers no sun protection and SPF6 is low. When you need real cover, layer a suitable broad-spectrum sunscreen such as our Protect & Tan SPF range, and always avoid over-exposure to the sun.

Good to know

Your Carrot Oil questions, answered

What does Carrot Oil actually do?+

It is a glow-boosting tanning oil that enhances your natural tan for a deeper, glossy, golden finish, while conditioning oils keep your skin soft and smooth as you bronze.

SPF0 or SPF6, which should I choose?+

SPF0 is for experienced tanners who want maximum glow with no sun protection, so it is for tanning use only. SPF6 gives a light, low level of cover while you build colour. Neither replaces a proper sunscreen.

Is it greasy or sticky?+

No. It is a fine, dry-touch oil mist that absorbs quickly to a silky, non-sticky, high-shine finish rather than sitting heavy on the skin.

Can I use it on a sunbed?+

Yes. It is a favourite with sunbed users and experienced tanners for an even, golden colour. Always follow your salon’s own guidance.

Does it protect me from the sun?+

SPF0 offers no protection and SPF6 is low. When you need real sun protection, layer a suitable broad-spectrum sunscreen, such as our Protect & Tan SPF range, over the top.

How do I keep the glow going?+

Apply generously and evenly before exposure, then reapply after swimming, sweating or towel-drying. Avoid intensive midday sun between 11am and 3pm.

Ready for your deepest glow?

Pick your scent and get the dry-touch carrot oil mist that bronzes to a glossy, golden finish, every time you tan.
